content:
# Interpolation

**Summary**: The mathematical estimation of values between known data points.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2010-al-moqbel|Al-Moqbel, 2010]] used DSI interpolation to create smooth surfaces for time and velocity data.

## Scientific Context

- [[2010-al-moqbel|Al-Moqbel, 2010]] Essential for creating continuous surfaces from sparse or irregularly sampled seismic points.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2010-al-moqbel|Al-Moqbel, 2010]] Implemented via the DSI algorithm to minimize global roughness.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- DSI was chosen because it models the geometry of natural objects better than polynomial functions. ([[2010-al-moqbel|Al-Moqbel, 2010, p. 34]])
